reviews.review_description:
I ignored this game for a long time, because for some reason I thought it was a hunting game. Hunting deer or rabbits in the woods. I guess I didn't really pay much attention. I'm glad I didn't...this past week I was very bored with VR. Couldn't find any new/decent games to play. I did a thorough search through the store, with it being on sale for $13 i thought, maybe i could see what kind of hunting experience it is. After reading it I was so mad at myself for ignoring it all that time. After playing it I vowed to never assume anything about a game again. I love everything about this game. The story is great, graphics, movement. Survival games are my favorite. I love having to make sure you eat and drink enough. Finding ingredients, making your own recipes. Upgrades, collectibles. Scavenging for items to craft. I love the ziplining, climbing and even the hunting. It's got everything. It's a long game too. I would have paid much more than $13 for it. It's definitely worth $30-$40. I don't leave alot of reviews, but I noticed this had less than 4 stars, which made no sense. I figured I'd throw my 2 cents in for anyone like me, looking for a good survival game. I didn't encounter any bugs or stuttering. It was smooth. I am playing on a quest 3s if that matters. 
Thanks for the awesome game!

Great game……one thing:

On medium health is very hard  and on easy not existant  at all.  Kill
Part of the fun…need some tweaking….because worrying about health is fun
…on easy should be there
For the fun…but  not too. Demanding…
Good
Game… othewise i am habing a wonderful time….this is a fun game
Nthank you very much. Plus incredible stealh with good AI…love you guys

reviews.review_title: ONLY REVIEW YOU NEED TO READ
reviews.review_description:
Ok I’m going to have a ranking system at the bottom but lets talk about this you start off as a 25yr man on the way to your fathers cabin to spread his ashes your shot down but a gang and crash onto the island your sister sam is missing and you have to locate her story itself isn’t terrible a free play would be a lot better but the story is still a nice change of pace now some notable things people have been having issues with the knife spawns in the left arm in a sleeve people that bought this for the Q2 I’m sorry but you didn’t read the game bio it will not work for you also if you can’t read the handwriting on notes press trigger and it will change the font now some notable issues for some reason between loading screens you will become 11 feet tall for the rest of your game no matter what you do with your border or game height I had to get on a chair and press my quest button to fix it and went back minutes later (devs I love this game it’s a great project I just want to be unbiased the graphics aren’t great especially for such a big company collab however “ps2” is a stretch it’s more quest 2 status which isn’t unplayable by any means now the item calibration is MESSED up it’s super wonky trying to get your gun to be on your left hip and resets a lot also can’t grab it without looking down at your gun slot which is annoying they also don’t have a grab delay so if you hover your hand over your holster grab trigger let go and do it again you can’t grab anything until you move your hand far away from your holster the voice acting randomly switches from casual ai to super weeird loud ai so idk What that’s about shooting and hunting is actually way better than I thought weird thing in the cabin is like everything is grab able which is all over your screen super annoying but again not to bad crafting and cookings cool but the hi drives me nuts there needs to be a setting to turn in and off things like the sprint and compass ui it’s a total immersion killer and obviously you guys have heard it enough but no sleeping mechanics kinda suck waiting around for the sun to rise being able to set up camps same with fire as well around the map would be an awesome solution to that as well as sleeping in the cabin I’m about half way into the game and seriously enjoying it but these issues are almost game breaking especially the bugs I was so hyped for this drop and am still loving it but I would be lying if I didn’t say I’d rather wait for a update it feels a little rushed  the performance lag wise I will say is great and the loads short and simple from place to place and quick traveling is so nice when I’m not coming back 50 feet tall and I mean not really somthing I was super bothered with but the voice acting in general wasn’t horrible but the start scene and the few leading up were unbearable a lot of replayed sounds and screams as well I’d like to remind people this is a fresh launch and at 20 dollars your getting more than what it’s worth they understood the value of this game and I’m so excited to see where they take it I’m seriously passionate about this project and would love to see upcoming plans give a 2 cents been playing vr since standalone was a myth and I love to see studios like this try to take things to the next level I’ll of course tune in if anything comes up and let everyone know but so far so decent I’m having fun and spending time my moneys worth? Absolutely side note the scope needs a serious re work I’m hoping that’s just a “for now asset” because for those who don’t know you get put into a black screen with a scope cutout csgo style unlike titles like Pavlov where you can see around you and into the scope makes a weird tunnel vision affect super hard to shoot forced to run iron sights on all my guns and kinda ties into that but if you hold your gun up normal length in front of you half of it will disappear and you see through the gun which is meh but oh well some graphic critique would be things like assets aren’t smooth like the spray paint is floating above the rock not on it when you grip a gun your stabilizing hand isn’t fully gripping it grass that “hides” you being super flat and visible static edges on some things items in direct light are super dark “like the hanging men” stuff like that above all it’s a little less what I expected but not by much 

Story 8/10
Sound 5/10
Graphics 6/10
Gun mechanics 6/10
Hunting 8/10
Combat 6/10 
World interaction 6/10
Animal/enemy Ai 5/10 
Cooking/crafting 8/10
Settings 4/10
Voice acting 6/10
Moment 7/10
FPS/performance 9/10
Bugs/crashes (frequent)
Music 5/10
Plot 7/10
Game length 7/10
Content 6/10
Difficulty 5/10 (medium)  

OVERALL RATING: 6.5/10 

(8/10 or 9/10 if issues are taken into account in upcoming updates preferably within a year)

ADD A FREAKING FREEPLAY MODE THE STORY IS LACK LUSTER WE WANT A MODERN GREEN HELL

I was really enjoying this game, however, after about 15 hours of game play, I’ve started having odd glitches. Yesterday it started, my ammo would vanish for a while, then reappear… not a big deal but annoying when being shot at! Today I logged on after saving at the cabin last night and when I come in, my back pack was empty. The shot gun I just picked up (still broken) was gone, the ferro tool to start fires.. gone , all my food and supplies I hadn’t unloaded at the cabin yet? All gone.  I can’t  rebuild the ferro so I’m unsure what to do with that, and the shot gun shows as I have it so it keeps directing me to take it to the craft table to fix it… but I don’t have it and the craft table does it on the paper as not having it, but the game thinks I do and keeps telling me to go fix it. I’m very unsure what todo from here… also I am noticing my arm disappearing while collecting garlic specifically from time to time and it takes a bit for it to correct.  rating 4 stars in hopes of it being fixed and I can give 5 stars. Up until now, I was really into it. Once this is handled, I will redo my review, as I am really into this! I don’t get why ppl are complaining about the graphics and keep comparing it to green hell. For me, I’d rather have graphics that aren’t cream of crop (which metaquest3  just  isn’t ready for when combined with all the other upgraded playabilities added to green hell  VR) versus the insane stuttering green hell does after a couple …in game days..at a single location. I feel the graphics are just fine in Tracked  and it’s absolutely worth the down grade in visual ( though it’s not that extreme to begin with) to get to play the game without the “moon walk” being your main mode of 

I feel that if you come into this game expecting top tier visuals and tons of murderus action, you won’t enjoy it. But, if you’re like me and enjoy survival games like medieval dynasty , Frost VR, and yes, green hell vr ( for the survival play instead of the visuals being your main reason to play… then you will really be into this game as much as I am. I’ve been downloading (and returning) SO many games lately just trying to find one like this. So I am VERY excited this was released and I hope the devs get it straightened out so I can continue to play without fear of losing my entire back pack inventory again!



Update- while I didn’t follow through for the shotgun return, I did get the ferro tool back and was able to complete the game Sans shotgun. I really enjoyed it, thank you! I’m on the hunt for another, I just finished song in the smoke , and it seems that not many are into these games so few are made. Please make another soon lol I’m thinking a western style!

I had high expectations because I loved Green hell but the games needs some good polishing. The graphics and the sounds are average. Actions are realistic but the physics are not optimal, the shooting especially. It is not a real open world as the borders are not reachable. Going too close to a corner leads to black screens. Fighting NPCs is not that hard, except the clunky mechanics sometimes.

For the gameplay: The time passes too quickly and the hard mode is ridiculous as you have to drink and eat many times per day. There's nothing interesting near your base which means that you have to go further to search for food and water. I spent 2-3 hours before I got a good amount of resources in order to go further. There's only one bottle of water which is not practical and you don't really need fire to cook as you have the stove with 0 actions needed. 
Sleeping is useless (available only in the cabin) as you lose too much thirst and hunger points. You can just go on with sleepless nights with no impact at all for your health. There's no sickness as well and you can just eat raw meat on the go and get your health back with mushrooms and garlic.
The scavenging is not that interesting as there is mostly scrap metal. NPCs don't give any weapons. The crafting system is interesting (TWD style) but the actions are quite simple and we cannot do it from other places, only in the cabin. Also, crafting, stocking or retrieving items (in/from the box) takes time as we cannot do it at once.

Furthermore, holsters cannot be personalized. 
Having always the gps-like mode takes some of the survival spirit. The time travel option, too (plus, it adds way more time than going alone).

Some bugs: bullets and arrows that hit invisible walls when taking cover. Locks on boxes reappear. Some NPCs may respawn. Returning to base with fast travel takes only time but no food and the stats don't change.
It happens often to crash during the loading screen (towards misty forest).

Games freaking awesome! Survival mechanics are fun and no where near as hardcore as I thought. Gun fights are tense and fun. Just like every other vr game it has some issues but for every little thing this game isn’t perfect at it does fifty things right. Don’t skip this one.


Update: had to drop it to 3 stars. I came across several bugs. The worst one is in the mines. I got the generator working and pumped out all the water. However when I try to walked into the area I just pumped out i immediately die. Everytime. I cannot beat the game unless I start the game all over again. I do not want to do that. What a shame. I really wanted to finish this one.
This game is really fun, but this is a huge warning to make sure you collect every leather scrap you see you will need it in the long run

reviews.review_title: Reason... this game is so much FUN
reviews.review_description: The reason these players are having performance problems for this game and most games CLEAN UP YOU STORAGE!! you either have too many games installed , or too many videos.. Just have two or 3 games .. Clear up space!! Its not the GAME ITS YOU, YOU BRAINLESS .. Doesn't crash neither is it  janky not even.. 8+ hrs no crashing or jankiness, only time this occurs for me is when most of my storage is full..

You start your adventure in a plain. Unfortunately bad guys shoot the plain down. Now you have to survive…

You are in the bush, all alone, just the sound of the river, the trees, the animals all around you,.. so realistic.

I played on easy mode, because I just want to explore everything. And I enjoyed it all. 
Everything is well explained. How to make arrows for your bow, make a fire stick,…

Explore the environment, search for stuff to upgrade. Survive.

I am still playing, and I am enjoyed every minute in game.

This game is good but it is very glitchy. If you could fix the glitches i would give this game a 20! The story is fantastic along with the graphics but could use alot if work. If you guys put the time in to fix everything wrong with this game id think you'd have one of the best Quest Games ever! So get on that lol
This was on my wishlist and should have bought earlier! Recommended!

For me, this is a very fun game. You'll experience a beautiful adventure in a moody and atmospheric mountain forest. The music and sounds of nature surround you. You have to hunt, eat, and drink to survive. I enjoy tearing apart small animals after catching them. It's a very cool idea. You have to skin larger ones with a combat knife. You have a hut, which is your base, where you cook various dishes. There are many recipes. If you find a larger pot, you can cook larger dishes. The crafting equipment is very similar to that in S&S games. You have a backpack and various weapons. Two bows, the same ones I have in real life, a revolver, a shotgun, two rifles, and a knife. The shooting mechanics are very satisfying, both with bows and firearms. The maps are quite large and diverse, with beautiful views and caves. The climbing is well-done. The story is simple but enjoyable, sometimes funny, sometimes touching. I had a lot of fun playing this game. I spent about 12 hours enjoying it. I highly recommend it to everyone and look forward to future releases from this studio. I give it a 4-star rating and wish it the best of luck.

The game also has its flaws. Long loading times. Occasionally, there are bugs. However, it's clear that updates are being made regularly and the game is being updated.

developer_response.body:
Hello, we're glad you're having a good time in our game. 
Thanks so much for the review, we really appreciate it :)

reviews.review_description: I was pleasantly surprised by Tracked and really enjoy the story. It's more straightforward than Green Hell, and a very fun Quest Achievement Hunt!

Boss at the end can go through walls to get at you apart from that I loved it / warning though don't play on easy yur health can go down but food and water doesn't move they stay full 3 stars for that, 
I'm gonna play on normal next time

This game is pretty good. It’s basically about a story and everything but just the thing the graphics are not that good in. I don’t know why but why the tasks are so hard in this game 
￼

reviews.review_title: Best value vr game on the market
reviews.review_description: It took me 6 hours to beat the campaign and takes about 10 hours to do everything there is to offer in the game. The story was awesome and had so good scenery. Guns are good, they paid attention to details like sliding the mag into the gun, and the bullet sliding into the chamber. The crafting system was great. To craft you have to actually build it by putting pieces together, using machines or hammering stuff together. And to load guns you have to individually load bullets into them. Do make that think you can’t reload quick, because you can save filled magazines to grab instead of load them one by one.
This game is great but can someone tell me where in the heck is the 2nd axe blade and handle also there is a glitch and I cant make fire.

I really liked this game. Lots of maps in a cool wilderness area to explore. One of my main hobbies IRL. I bought this game for the adventure and not for the shooting. I’m not into shooting and killing so i was glad there was much more to this game and story than just killing. As a biologist, I wasn’t a dan of the aggression of the predators as that’s not realistic and I wanted to give them space and not hurt them. This wasn’t always an option. There were some cool and surprising wildlife sightings I enjoyed. I played on easy and but I didn’t need to eat or drink once in the entire game which is more an absent survival component than an easy one. I would also go days without sleeping with no affect. Those components could be improved. Only had a couple small bugs that restarting the game fixed.

developer_response.body: Oh we have a real survival pro here, and with nothing but kind words?! That's so amazing, thanks so much for the review and the feedback. Stay safe out there in the wilderness!

reviews.review_title: Fun Game but Bugs lots of Bugs
reviews.review_description: Hello development team I hope you read this because I really like this game. It’s a lot of fun except for in the dark. That’s only because it gets really creepy at night. But there’s a few bugs in this game like for instance when you’re walking on land sometimes you’re slushing through water as far as the audio is concerned. But that’s not why I’m here because that’s just a small issue. As of late this game has stopped allowing me to grab loot or anything except for bullets and the guns that I’m carrying. Is there any way to fix that. I have tried restarting the game several times I even made a video to have proof, but those don’t work. Any resolved would be great thank you
Dude the sound of creaking trees and a bridge shouldn't play miles away from it or underground pls fix its like nails on chalkboard

so i was playing this game then I then I was like the graphics are not good, and i'm more of like a superhero shooter and not this. so i go to refund it and they don't accept refunds. this game is a scam do not buy

reviews.review_title: Solo Developers have made better games
reviews.review_description:
This game is by no stretch of the imagination a good game. I don’t know what kind of mental gymnastics you’d have to do to give this anything higher than 2 stars. The graphics are horrible, which I suppose is kinda the Quest’s limitations fault, but still I feel like they could have looked at least a little better than this.

There are game breaking glitches that prevent you from progressing tasks in your journal. I was unable to pick up the Cattail plant.

The AI is really dumb and I even had one of the human enemies take cover behind literally nothing, but still performed animations as if they were hiding behind something when they were clearly exposed out in the open no where near any kind of cover. It also wasn’t that satisfying to shoot the enemies or stab them in stealth, it all just felt very unsatisfying, awkward, unpolished, and low budget.

When you die the loading takes way too long every single time you die. It’s dumb that you can’t use your knife to attack the wolves, it’s a knife, therefore it should be possible to use as a weapon. The presentation and immersion feels shallow and low budget in ways that even games made by a solo developer don’t.

The concept is cool, but the execution is mediocre at best. In its current broken and rough state I can’t in good faith recommend paying for this game.



TLDR:
Graphics are DooDoo
Performance is PooPoo
This was not ready for release 
If this was in early access and made by only one developer maybe I could be more forgiving and turn a blind eye, but this is just laughably bad and I personally am pretty tolerant for games that are made by small teams, but come on guys, this is no where near ready for release.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for sharing your thoughts with us, and we're sorry the experience isn't quite what you hoped for.
That being said, we want to assure you that our devs are working on many improvements, all based on the feedback we're getting from our players. We want to align with your needs! 

Keep an eye out for the upcoming updates, and hopefully you will give us a second chance in the future!

reviews.review_description: Good game

-stabbed a guy and it didn’t even register on multiple occasions 
- was able to grab the rifle before opening the safe
-when you try to grab the handguard of the the rifle with your left hand the gun teleports into your left hand instead
-when trying to holster your revolver on your right hip it will teleport to your left hip
-When trying to pull out a bullet to reload it will disappear and go back into your inventory immediately

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for letting us know about these issues, we'll investigate!

reviews.review_description: When I say that I don't mean an open world game with enemy camps sprinkled around (although I would love to see that as a vr game in the future), I mean more of a survival/stealth shooter that has you gain resources, upgrade gear, and fight your way through the Canadian wilderness. The game has its rough parts, stiff animations for cutscenes (hopefully you guys can afford a mocap suit in the future), a lack of weaponry (Aks, semi automatic pistols like an M9 or 1911, machette, etc...) and an alright but not incredibly deep plot. I think some of the VA work could use some work as well as the animations, then the story might be a bit more immersive. Good start so far, and I think people need to give this game a bit more credit.

I can  deal with the graphics but the sound glitches suck. My save is ruined because no matter where im walking it sounds like im walking through water...you can have enemies in front of you but their voices are are coming from behind you. I won't even go into the hit box issues or the loading issues.

developer_response.body: Hey there! We're here to help if things are not working. Please describe your issue over at support@incuvo.com, and one of our team members will try to guide you through the problem!

reviews.review_description: At first I thought it would be great but the more I played it. Meh, for several reasons. One being ui being in your face the entire time. Graphic update was meh. Easy to run around frustrated trying to figure how to advance. Enemy is not smart. Hopefully a few updates will fix but I’m not even gonna finish it honestly until I see one.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for taking the time to write us a review. We released an update last week, with additional improvements, so be sure to take a look and perhaps give the game a second chance! :)

reviews.review_description: I was holding off on this game for some time, but with the new visual update I figured now would be the time to try it. All I can say is that it really is one of the better releases of the year, I don't have a good sense of how it looked or played before, but judging by the more negative reviews from the past, the devs went above and beyond, as I didnt encounter 90% of issues raised. This is a great VR action survival game on all accounts. I'll be taking my time sightseeing and hunting and surviving this Christmas!

It’s got some good action, survivals nice and guns are awesome! 5 star game for me. I got 5 hours in so far and the amount of content is unbelievable! Of course it’s got some small bugs, but nothing game breaking in my experience. Absolutely Love It!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the five stars, we're absolutely excited to see you're having a blast in our game!

reviews.review_description: Is it worth it? Absolutely, if you’re into survival games￼￼ you’ll love this one! ￼The crafting ￼is one of my favorites, lots of things you can make. I also like the cooking part of it as well. The combat is fun and intense sometimes, it gets the blood flowing. ￼there’s a lot of content and gameplay so you’ll be busy trying to survive.￼

developer_response.body: Did you discover your inner-chef in TRACKED?! :D Thanks for the positive review, means a lot!

reviews.review_description:
In my first review  i said i can’t load in so I decided to make a new save, and it worked! I have played up to the hunting part and I can say the graphics are all right but that doesnt really matter but the gameplay is very good and fun.

I will continue to keep playing and I hope it will work perfectly. 

I have kept playing and I am very sad I am stuck in a hill with no way out. I have accidentally saved the game which has made it so I can’t go back. I am almost finished and I do not want to restart after 4:30 hours. To the devs please fix this bug and add a unstuck button

developer_response.body: Awesome, thanks for updating your review :) We did fix some loading times in our last update, so they're much shorter now too. We do wish you a great time in TRACKED!

reviews.review_description:
Bought this recently and I don't know what other people are talking about, they need there eyes testing as the graphics are pretty God dam good for Quest 3 in my opinion, 10x better than the likes of the graphics in survival nation and into the radius and a much better game than those in many ways

Don't get me wrong its not perfect but no vr game is, even after the recent update it has bugs still at certain points like not being able to load guns, even grab them or your note pad which is frustrating and the sensitivity of pumping the shot gun and sensitivity of grabbing things out your back pack is over the top it really frustrates me but I'm sure they'll fix and adjust those things, also at certain points the time doesn't change and health etc doesn't drop, other than that, great story, great gameplay and graphics I think, havent completed it yet but good once you do you can still go hunting etc after completion but I think it should have a proper new game plus added and more weapons etc to craft

If these things get added and fixed I'll surley give the game 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Yuck, lost all excitement in minutes
reviews.review_description:
First off I’m going to say. The polygon graphics have been gone since first crapstation. This game is bloody clunky at best. Gave me a knife, and took it away in seconds, leaving me with nothing for all other tutorials. I pushed through the crappy gameplay to the cabin, and after o realized I have to restart it, I was done. 
    This is nowhere near as good as Green Hell, and I imagine Sony probably payed to get the first updates before anyone else. Making me instantly refund this crap.
    They also updated BulletStorm, and now runs like crap too. Still looks better than this though. Now just jumping all over the place sadly.  Come on guys I know for a fact you can do better. The video doesn’t even look as bad as the game does. Maybe I’ll try it again later on, but probably only if it’s 99% off.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for sharing your thoughts. We’re really sorry your first experience felt frustrating. That’s never the impression we want to leave.

About the knife: it actually shouldn’t disappear. In the tutorial it automatically moves into the left forearm holster, so it should still be available there. Stick your hands to the front, look left, and it should be there to grab :)
The rest of your points about visuals and overall feel are also noted. We’re collecting all early feedback and are already working on improvements based on what players are reporting.

If you decide to return later, we hope the experience will feel smoother and closer to what you’re looking for.

Thanks again for taking the time to write this.

reviews.review_description:
The action and crafting is very fun but there are a couple bugs I want to point out so that the developer can fix them

- The beginning audio sounds good and all but the characters mouths don’t match up

- When ever moving to a area that brings up the loading screen if you are holding a weapon the weapon just disappears. Lost my bow because of this.

Also a major bug is that sometimes animals and smugglers don’t see you as a threat and they just stand there or walk around until you kill them.

I was so impressed by the opening scene, really sets the tone.
Unfortunately I have had to update my review 
Loading times are an absolute disaster and soo slow, game crashes too much and trying to stay alive with limited food is no fun.

developer_response.body: Hey there, we've released an update last week that shortens the loading times by A LOT! :) We'd love to see an update from you on this matter.

reviews.review_title: It's Great! If you like basic visuals
reviews.review_description:
After seeing the rendered characters in the opening plane sequence and then that extremely annoying navigation waypoint icon that is like an irritating fly in your vision...it's a hard pass.

I refuse to play games that look like resident evil 1 on the PlayStation. 

The bar was set years ago with Red Matter 2 and every developer has to at least come close. 

I cant stand when reviewers "forgive the graphics because of the Quest 3 limitations" that's absolute nonsense! 

We have seen what the Quest is capable of and im not going back. Initial impressions are paramount and this fell well below par for me.

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear the initial impression didn’t work for you. We’ve noted your feedback on visuals and UI elements, and appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: After a difficult start, as my game dropped to 1 FPS from “Father's Hut” onwards and my “Quest3” was so overloaded that not even the reset button responded, I actually wanted to return the game and write a 1-star review. However, the issue was likely that the shaders were still loading while playing, which overwhelmed the quest. It may be advisable to load them before playing, as with “Alien Rogue Incursion” and “Asgard's Wrath.” Nevertheless, I am glad I gave the game a second chance. Everything ran smoothly on the second attempt. The game is similar to “Green Hell” with elements from "Far Cry" & “Saints & Sinners” (especially the crafting boards with the recipes). Graphically, it may not be the most beautiful game, but it's still atmospheric. An extremely addictive game. The mechanics for crafting and cooking are particularly motivating. However, there are a few things I would have liked to see improved: 1. The fast travel board. You don't really know where you're going to end up, as the locations don't tell you much. A name with a small picture of the surroundings would be helpful. 2. The sound when putting things in your backpack could be louder. 3. The diary marker is annoying when an icon pops up in front of my eyes with every entry. A short beep would be better, and the wristwatch could have a flashing LED, which would be much more immersive. 4. Cutscenes should be skippable. Otherwise, I would like to see the game released on PC with better graphics, even if PCVR players are extremely toxic and elitist.

After all the hype from the devs and youtubers that this was the game that they were looking forward to the most. I have to agree the graphics are more like early 90s or early Sonic the Hedgehog. The movement is very clunky and its hard to get the backpack off. The hands look horrible and at times it looks like I'm double jointed. Almost the same as Green Hell or Frost but no where near as good. Way to many problems to list I would be here all day. I think I'm going to ask for a refund.
This game could have been so much better. There are games out there that proof the quest 3 can do better graphics just look at Ghost Town or Red Matter. Its just pure laziness on the devs part. C'mon guys pull yourselves together and stop trying to rip people off with this crap. Very poor effort.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for writing down your thoughts, and sorry to hear the experience didn’t quite meet your needs. We appreciate you pointing out the issues with visuals, movement, hands, and interactions; we’re already gathering early feedback to prioritize improvements.

We understand if you decide to refund, but if you check back later, we hope the updates feel closer to what you were looking for. Thanks again for taking the time to leave feedback.

reviews.review_title: The PS2 graphic is crazy smh
reviews.review_description:
If you made Green hell, why go backwards and degrade the graphics now this way SMH

 it's supposed to be a beautiful vibrant jungle but these low Nintendo 64 graphics are not hitting... could hold back a potentially great game smh.

I find this game a bit technical but maybe its me , I can't figure things out, the book 📖 is chaotic to read , I found a bandage but can't use it because it's not ready ? I have no idea how to use the bandage or get it ready, can't find nothing in the book , my head now hurts. 
 🤕 

I beat many game in VR , but if the beginning of the game is too technical , I can tell there's many other things I won't be able to figure out without getting an aneurysm or having to refer to YouTube (not fun)😵‍💫 I never lived in the jungle so I won't know what to do smh 

I wanted to play this game but I may have to Refund it because I can't use the bandage and that alone shows it's more technical then I thought and not gamer friendly ...to me..

Story looks like it was going to be good tho

 😞

Update nov 16 , still no changes, 

Thanks for responding I figured out the bandage thanks to you. Unfortunately the next thing it told me to do was to use my knife and open the locker to get the rifles. I take the rifle out and I place it on the table and then I reach for the pistol because it looks nice. I turn back around to the table and the rifle is gone it just disappeared can't find it and it's like bugged up or something.  Judging by the reviews and it seems that you're going through the same thing you went through with your last two games , there seems to be a major skill issue within this company. I find it funny if you tell me that you play your own game and then said okay it's ready to Release.. Either it's incompetency  or you don't really care about us gamers, or It's a money issue or a skill issue.... seems like you don't learn anything from your prior games. Thanks for the attempt tho

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the feedback, we really appreciate you taking the time.

About the bandage:
• You need to craft it at the workbench in the hut you reach after the crash.
• Recipes are listed there, if you have the right materials, you’ll see a green checkmark. 
• Once you choose the recipe all the crafting materials will appear on the table, follow the steps to create your item of choice.
• After crafting, hold the trigger and wrap it around your hand to apply it.

As for the visuals - thank you for sharing your thoughts. We’ll definitely note this and see what we can improve in future updates.

reviews.review_description:
Ive just started, but outside of the terrible graphics it has a good mix of stealth and shooting. 

I wanted to put this quickly as others might have the same issue. When you first get the knife and drop it, it’s actually placed into n your left wrist. It’s not explained so I went a while without the knife 

Hope that helps

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, we really appreciate it! We'll definitely explain where the knife goes better, as it does spark confusion among our players. Stay safe in the wild!

reviews.review_description:
Yes, the game is still rough, still has plenty of bugs, yes, the enemies are dumb and the visuals are questionable. But! It’s a genuinely big game with huge areas and a full story. It’s engaging and it pulls you in. And the survival and crafting elements are well-designed and intuitive. This game is much better than 90% of what you can download from the store.

Also, the developers proved with their previous game that they know how to support and improve their projects over the long run. So I’m confident this one will get much better with time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and for believing in our team. We're working on improvements, so stay tuned! :)

reviews.review_description: Voice acting isn't the best, the graphics aren't all that great and the combat is lacking but of course it is still early, I have confidence that updates can help.

I hate to give any game a bad review, but I can’t even make it past dad’s cabin because the knife I was given disappeared. It’s not in either of my holsters or in my backpack and there isn’t an option to craft a new one so I can’t open the locker to continue the game. I’m sure this will be fixed in a future patch, disappointing to say the least.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're here to help and explain! The knife actually doesn’t disappear; it automatically goes into the left forearm holster, which isn’t obvious at first. If you check your left arm, it should be there and usable for the locker.

That said, we agree the tutorial needs to explain this much more clearly, and we’re already looking into improving that. Thanks for letting us know!

reviews.review_description: It keeps closing the app when i travel
Best game ever

This is a great game. The graphics are definitely not the best, but they aren’t the worst at all. The story and exploration is amazing, there are a few little bugs, but that is to be expected for recent releases in games. I only hope that the developers continue to update the game. Otherwise, this is well worth 20$ for what you get!

I love this game already I've just played an hour of it and I can tell it's going to be a blast. I feel it has a mix of a lot of survival type games like the forest, green hell and a bit of early farcry. There are a few things about the game i think hold it back like the little game settings. It has the essentials but lacks Ui settings like disabling the notebook and backpack icons and the quest direction icon. Maybe instead of the compess being on the screen the whole time you just have to open the journal then it is displayed. I think a lil more of other polishing should be done like the gun handling and a few visual improvements but I don't usually expect a lot from day one there's still time to update.

developer_response.body: Thanks, we've noted the additional UI settings suggestion! The devs are working on many improvements, so keep your eye on the upcoming updates!

reviews.review_description:
This game is like ‘Grid Legend’s’ to me. I didn’t buy it for a year and a half due to the negative reviews. And it’s the best racing game on Quest. 
It seems the lower the review score a game has the more fun it is. 
The Graphics are good but not great, but the game itself self is super fun.  You will get lost￼ in this game playing for hours on end. 
Don’t be like me and miss out on great games because you’re looking at the review score.  This game deserves to be bought and played. 
Great Job developers.

developer_response.body: Thank you for trusting us! Have fun, and hey, we're releasing an update today that will allow you to keep playing even after the credits, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Potential, but seems VERY Early Access
reviews.review_description:
Sorry, but here's just too much Jank in every Aspect of the Game atm.  I'm pausing this Game for now and will wait a few Months, hoping for some good Updates to come.
This is the Bulletstorm Situation all over again...... Devs didn't learn anything from that, it seems.

developer_response.body:
Edit: Hello, we've released many updates, including a Visual Upgrade, since you left your review. Would you mind giving the game another go and letting us know how it plays now? Thanks!

Thanks for the review, the devs are working on updates and enhancements. Sorry, that the game didn't quite meet your expectations on Day 1, but we'll try to change that!

reviews.review_title: Intense just like green hell VR!
reviews.review_description:
Just starting playing a bit and wow did it start off intense and thrilling right off the bat! From plane being shot down and crash landing, to evading a group of armed men! Man is this game a rush! 
Visual quality is oka but for the price can’t complain! Looking forward to exploring more.

developer_response.body: Awesome, thank you for the review, and remember to always watch your back in TRACKED!

reviews.review_title: I really want to like it
reviews.review_description: Its a good game but has a lot of issues. The mechanics and premise are great. Foraging and cooking are a lot of fun. However the ai are rough and there are some big bugs. Right now im dealing with accidentally duping a rifle while trying to grab an arrow. This filled the base locker, making me lose my shotgun.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for pointing out the weak spots, we'll totally do a deeper dive on them! Stay tuned for the upcoming patches and fixes!

reviews.review_description: Its well polished, I enjoyed the combat and crafting experience. One thing that went over my head was the place the knife is stored, I thought I had lost it right after using the first time, only when I reach the resin tutorial I found it in my left arm.. don't know if I skipped some text or something

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words, really glad to hear the combat and crafting clicked for you!

We’ll definitely look at making the information about where the knife goes more straightforward, so it doesn’t catch others off guard.

Thank you again for playing and sharing your experience. This kind of feedback helps us refine things even further!

reviews.review_description:
This game is great. It’s a really solid survival experience. But there are a few glaring issues I’m going to point out here that I hope get patched soon.

1. As I’ve been getting farther into the game, particularly into the snowy area, I’ve noticed more and more frame drops and lag spikes that have nearly gotten me killed on a few occasions. I don’t understand how this game has graphics this simple and is still doing that. Doesn’t feel like a finished product at that point.

2. Rifle magazines. Started noticing it with the bolt action rifle, then even more-so with the semi automatic rifle. I would remove the mag in order to load more bullets into it, then bring it back to the mag well of the gun, just for it to not insert, no matter how hard I tried. The only way I’d be able to do it again is to reload the level. Please look into this, as it forces me to use my shotgun and revolver after reloading it just one time, since without the mag, it’s unusable.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're really glad to hear you’re enjoying the survival experience! We’ve noted the issues you mentioned with performance in the snowy area and with rifle magazines not re-inserting properly. Both are things the team is already looking into as we review early player reports.

Really appreciate you taking the time to break this down — updates and fixes are on the way.

reviews.review_description: I was playing and I set a 15 minute timer and then I kept playing and this game is like far cry green hell vr combined this game is good in my opinion needs multiplayer because I want to play with friends
The whole thing sucked the only enjoyment I had with this game was the crafting aspect and plus when I finished the game it despawn my backpack so all that time spend gathering stuff wasted￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to write us a review. We’ve noted your feedback, and we'll think of ways to improve the game.

reviews.review_title: Hi can you please make it multiplayer
reviews.review_description: Please make multiplayer please please please.   Like really soon ..  please... Please and I just started and I love it and no ..it don't have to be like green hill but from what I started great art visual.  This is a great game and honestly don't listen to those people this don't have the be green hill .. this is perfect please make MULTIPLAYER.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words, really glad you’re enjoying the game so far! ❤️
We totally understand the excitement around multiplayer, but right now, TRACKED is designed as a solo, isolated survival experience, where being alone in the wilderness is a core part of the atmosphere and tension.

reviews.review_description: Good game but i cant get past the radio tower and the plane crash.went around the whole map to get to the plane crash but every trail is a dead end and there in no off trail to get there.and i cant find the radio tower so if you could help me that would be great.

reviews.review_title: Sad to say Game has too many issues

developer_response.body: Hey there! We're sorry that our patch didn't manage to fix all of the issues you've been experiencing in TRACKED. Could you reach out to support@incuvo.com so the devs can ask you for more details there, and possibly a save file? They'll guide you through the process. This way they'll have a better understanding of the bugs, because some of them are very difficult to reproduce, and therefore to fix them. Thank you so much, and sorry for the trouble!

reviews.review_description:
I was initially disappointed in a lot of aspects of the game mainly the graphics , even using qgo is only so much of an improvement, the world building is solid , solid survival mechanics with more of an action focus this time around , you can definitely feel like Rambo tactically making your way through the wilderness or even just a regular hunter with a scoped rifle , game really opens up once you get out of the first map and starts to resemble more of an open world game which is a huge plus , all in all youre getting the closest thing to far cry VR but needs more polish and graphics definitely need to be touched up even if its just when getting close to something for better details.
 I do see the developers here noting the game will receive updates but I'd really stress please continue to build and expand upon the game similar to how green hell VR has outside of just bug fixes and polish , game has a ton of potential

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the thoughtful breakdown! Really glad to hear the survival loop, and the game simply clicked for you as you got deeper into it. We’ve noted all your points, and the team is working on the first update — hoping to roll it out this week.

reviews.review_description:
I gave a 2 stars reviews to the game beacsue it was unplayable because off the many bugs it had, plus the very bad graphic. Whit this patch not only they fixed many off the bugs in the game(at least you fixed all the bugs I encountered), but they improved graphic and few gameplay mecchainc  too! This is one off the best vr survival game ever released, the hunting, crafting, skinning, cooking are simply amazing. The only bad bug that remained is the non working rifles magazine. Thanks to developers for listening to us. Remeber that Christ died for u, if you put your trust in him and repent off your sins you'll receive eternal life. 
 W GAME AND W DEVS ✝️😊

developer_response.body: Awww, thank you so much for the review! We've shared it with the entire team, and everyone was super happy to see you're now able to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: Nice guns

Tried to look over the look to be a quest3 3s game ,but game just won't let you move forward  all you can do is upgrade your work station because once you get to the caves your stuck no way to get the generator started and don't have access to climbing tool like you see on trailer .maxed out the log cabin with no way to progress game really needs help I see why there is no discord now.i said all that to say if you don't have the money to blow it would be smart to wait to see if they care enough to fix all a there are a lot bugs and thing that need help.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're here to help! 

To get the generator and pump running, make sure you’ve done all of the following:

- Filled the generator with fuel using the gasoline canister
- Inserted the fuse into the generator
- Connected the pump’s wire to the generator
- Pulled the recoil starter handle to turn the generator on

Once all steps are complete, everything should power up correctly. Let us know if you still have trouble!

reviews.review_description: Look, I gave this game 5 stars but I’m gonna be completely honest, it’s not a 5 star game yet. Should you spend money on it? It’s kinda of up to you 🤷‍♂️. I trust the developers and they're very responsive if you notice in the reviews and frequently respond to negative reviews and are actively updating consistently in record time. I just think in the gaming community as a whole to see developers actively engaging with reviews and players seeking feedback and listening to players is refreshing. May not be perfect now but this is a diamond in the rough, and I bet it will be a great game on par or better with Green Hell which I loved. Thank you developers for being willing to keep VR gaming alive and listening to players. Solid!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the fair review! And yes, we are engaging with our players, because after all, we are making the game for them, for YOU! And that's the best way to work on making it suit everyone, by accepting and considering all the feedback :)
We have more patches on their way, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
This game has a great idea and I personally couldn’t resist buying it the second I heard about it but there are some serious problems. 

Firstly (something you’ve probably heard enough) the graphics are to a point where there’s little to no immersion at all. 

Secondly, this may be a personal thing but I’d still like to address it, the main character talks too much. I don’t think people wanna repeatedly hear his “OMG WHAYS THAT” “WHO DID THIS” “WHERES MY SISTER” “AH MY HAND”. The adult voice actor acts like the ingame kid version of the main character. Constantly scared and concerned.

Thirdly, for some reason my height was never ever normal. It always felt like I was super tall compared to everything and when I would try to touch the games floor my hand was stopped a foot away by my real carpet. 

Finally, may just be a glitch or a setting that needs tweaking but every time I holster my revolver into my right holster (my dominant hand is my right hand), the gun seems to teleport to my left holster. Kinda annoying.

I love the ideas of this game and it really does excite me but it’s just too un immersive for me. I’m gonna keep playing as I just got my American senses pleased with my hands on a gun so I’ll see if it works any better the more I play. Good luck guys and keep improving it.

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for the detailed review, we really appreciate it! The devs are working on improvements, so stay tuned for the upcoming patches! Hopefully you'll have a 5 star experience soon! :)

reviews.review_description: I want to praise the developers, very good atmosphere, I understand that the graphics could be a little better, but Quest is a mobile device, anyway, this game drew me into the story and I really like it, developers, I am very grateful to you for this exceptional game, thank you.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the five stars! :)

reviews.review_description:
Please just save your money until the devs are forced to do a graphics update !  

It’s almost 2026 and we are being given VR games with these kind of graphics,  devs should be ashamed of themselves producing what could be a great gaming experience with base line 20 year old graphics and visuals.  

As customers / gamers we deserve better for a product we are paying for. Solo devs have produced gorgeously crafted VR games with accomplished visuals.. there is no excuse now for this level of quality !! You know you can do better, so be better.  I won’t revisit this game until it’s had a graphics update.

developer_response.body:
Edit: Hey there, looks like it's tiem to revisit TRACKED, because we've just rolled out a Visual Upgrade! Please let us know how you like the game now! :) 

Thanks for sharing your thoughts, we’re really sorry the visual quality didn’t meet your expectations. We’ve seen a lot of feedback in this area, and the team is already reviewing it closely as we prioritize upcoming improvements.

reviews.review_description:
Not sure why people are saying it looks like PS2? The game looks good imo, not the best I've seen on Quest, but good. And the game is a lot of fun.

Now, it does have some issues. I really want a game with a full in game body. However, this game shows why we dont get that. Your body will do all kinds of craziness and just looks odd at times. Some things aren't explained very well, like how to make fire. I think it may have told me everything I needed to do, but I didn't hear 1 ingredient and of course that one ingredient wasn't shown in the list in the journal so had to resort to youtube. 

Overall, it was well worth the purchase.

developer_response.body: Hi, really glad to hear you’re having fun with the game and that the visuals worked for you. We’ve noted the points about full-body movement and unclear instructions (especially fire making), and we’re looking at improving those areas in upcoming updates. Appreciate you giving it a chance and sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: i love survival games ive played alot of them. But this is my overal favourite. Yeah there are some bugs. But nothing that has stopped me playing. I only wish was able to sleep in the beds as there are many about you just cant use them. Also the headlamp torch could be a little brighter. But all in all its a great game. If you love survival games this is a must have.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the suggestions, we've noted them all down!

reviews.review_description:
The mechanics and gameplay have been decent so far. Graphics are seriously lacking, but now I can’t get into the locker at the cabin because the knife disappeared when I put it in the holster. I even went back to try and put it in my backpack but it still vanished. Does anyone know how to bypass this? Or can you guys fix this please?

UPDATE: Figured out the knife is on your left wrist. Would’ve been nice if you guys mentioned that

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing this! We're really glad you managed to find the knife in the left forearm slot! We hear you, though: we'll explain it more clearly!
Also appreciate the note on graphics and overall impressions, all feedback like this helps us prioritize improvements as updates roll out.
Thanks again for taking the time to follow up and update your comment. It really helps!

reviews.review_description:
Update: After playing for almost 10 hours now I can say the game is incredibly fun, but just so dang buggy. I’m still having performance issues , and everything is just really glitchy. Everything from pulling resin off the knife to skinning animals is just a chore. Also the backpack is a chore to use as well as transferring mats to the storage chest. The concept is so good, I’m enjoying the story and the progression but fighting literally everything in the game is frustrating. You guys can make a good game you just lack the polish needed to take this to the proper level. I’ll leave it at 3 stars for now with hopes you can fix this up and give someone else a better experience than I’ve had.

This is a weird one for me to rate. I like the game and what’ it’s aiming to do. But a few things hold the game back from being 5 star worthy.

Many small bugs I’ve encountered so far. Like guns clipping into the crafting table when doing the repair. And clipping has been an issue in other circumstances as well. 

Lack of communication to the player. It told me to start a fire but in no way did I understand what order of things was needed to perform the task. Most other things in the game have a highlighted order to insert things while others do not leading to confusion .

I haven’t encountered any game breaking bugs as of now but will continue to update this review as I go.

People are hating on the Graphics and while they are not great the certainly are serviceable , people forget the quest has limitations , see medieval dynasty for example . Red matter has tiny areas with not much to render. You can’t compare the two in this scenario .

Performance is my main gripe. It’snot good and I almost refunded in the first 10 minutes. Luckily after I made it to the cabin performance seemed to even out a bit, but it still needs improvement . 

I’m also not a fan of the eating mechanic as it feels like I’m always in need of food and it becomes tedious and I feel like I’m never accomplishing anything but feeding myself. I seen you could adjust this in the settings and I will probably opt for that when I return .

All in all I like the game and mostly enjoyed my first couple hours in it, I’m rating it at 3 stars currently and will update my review as the devs improve the game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for such a detailed review, we really appreciate you taking the time to share both what worked for you and what didn’t. We’ve noted the issues and suggestions! Our team is actively reviewing early player feedback to investigate these issues and is working on a first update, with the goal of releasing it this week.

It’s great to hear you enjoyed the core experience despite the rough edges, and we’re glad performance improved a bit once you reached the cabin. Thanks again for giving the game a chance!

reviews.review_title: Great game only needs slight improvement
reviews.review_description:
Good game good story great crafting good enemies good ending ￼not the best voice acting and great graphics ( this review will be not that in depth because I accidentally
Deleted my 2 original reviews both where more than 20 
Paragraphs long )

Bugs I encountered when playing 

I was not able to complete the target practice mission. I was not able to insert the magazine into ￼any of the guns that required one. The animals ran very weirdly after they were shot at.
I was never able to find the shotgun during my play through. I was never able to starve of become thirsty. Certain enemies would clip though walls or floors. Some items would not stack correctly in the stash chest. One of my picks would not work so It was much harder to climb up walls.

￼ 
This game deserves a a mush better ￼ rating and this game is so much better than the green hell vr. The attention to detail is just perfect. Like look at the hanging crates they literally swaying the wind. 

Areas for improvement 

Please add a mode where you just service with no story at all. Maybe add rain that could fill up the water barrels that you find across the map. Mabey add patrols of enemy’s that just walk around the map.

￼note to devs 

Do not listen to the one star reviews you did such a great job. Thank you for giving the vr community such a great vr game. 

I was able to fix some of the bugs by leaving and rejoining the game.

(Sorry for the lack of description and details of where the glitch occurred. I just don’t want to wright a big review again )

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for taking the time to rewrite your review, and for all the kind words about the story, crafting, enemies, and overall experience. It really means a lot to the team to hear that you enjoyed the game this much.

We’ve noted all the issues you ran into, along with the suggestions, and we'll keep them all in mind while we keep on working on updates, enhancements, and fixes! 

Thanks again for fueling us with kind words, it means a lot!

reviews.review_description: Reminds me of far cry combined with the forest or green hell, i love the mechanics like making ammo,  hunting & skinning and the crafting system reminds me of twd saints and sinners but with cooler detailed steps, please keep updating and working on this i like it!

developer_response.body: Hey there, could you provide a deeper explanation of the bugs over at support@incuvo.com, please?

reviews.review_description:
I normally don't write reviews however this is as close to the game that I've been hoping  a developer would put out. It definitely has some issues nothing huge, some of which I don't know if it's possible for it even to be the game's fault. Here's my main issues:

1. Takes way too long to load when you travel to anywhere or load up from a saved spot.

2. When you grab the rifle with your barrel with your left hand it slides the trigger hand off the trigger and almost switches your hands around. Making it hard to hunt or trying to kill before being killed

3. A lot of times I have to load up the level I'm on because the fire won't light up it just turns the cotton plant thing black

4. When trying to find different pathways in the woods to find certain places like fathers swamp cabin, bigfoot lair..etc it won't let you go onto, what looks like somewhat obvious paths but if you run and jump at some or try to crouch it will most likely have you floating in the air and getting stuck in the woods behind trees and rocks. I still can't find a number of places because I can't get there

5. I can't say it's the game but I can say it doesn't happen in any other game I play. It's like the drift problem with the quest 2 controllers that needed to have the inside contacts pulled back out and it makes playing horrible. I don't know if that's a thing a game can make happen but I've got many shooter games, sports games and zero of them drift so I'm positive it's not my controller.

That's just the main bugs for me. Overall though the developer's did an excellent job on this and put a lot of thought into it. Great job!! Even with the bugs it gets 5 stars from me and hopefully you can get some of that fixed. Can't wait to see more from your team in the future

Update. New development after the update my pickaxe/zippline tool was gone and I can't find it anywhere. Not in backpack, not where I used it last and the items to build it are not back where they were originally. I'm stuck in a spot where I can't go further unless I have the zip line tool

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, and reports, we really appreciate all the details. As for the controller issue, you're using Quest 2 controllers? If so, then we cannot guarantee it's gonna work 100% correctly, because we've been developing the game for Quest 3/3S, supporting the newest controllers. We'll try to take a look at it though. 
We're glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: First off, so far I have enjoyed this game somewhat. Definitely has the green hell feel, but visually just lacking in the look. Also the AI enemies are very easy to take on. Im one of those that desperately want stranded deep to play as a survival game, so Im always looking for a VR survival game that can give that feel of trying to survive without the nonsense of mystical creatures.  I do like the crafting, game mechanics are pretty good, however the world to me just feels a bit blah to me. I think the random sounds and lack of interaction with most of the environment just feels boring. I want to really like this game, but after a couple times in, I just don’t feel as excited to keep playing. Maybe after time they will upgrade the look and add more to the game.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for taking the time to write us a review. Our latest patch has added some graphical improvements you might like. We're not stopping with the updates, so keep an eye out for more!

reviews.review_description: The graphics are really awful. I mean I don’t think you could get much worse and the game progression is very difficult when your gas can doesn’t spawn in where it is supposed to be located so I can’t get to the lumberjack camp because I can’t find the gas can to fuel the generator. I watched static of and I watched VR Wolf and VR and their gas cans were right there at the generator so where’s mine? You need to fix your game or you need to refund me my money ￼

developer_response.body:
Hey there, the gas can should be close to the generator. Many of them, in fact should be standing there. Some can be placed on the shelves, some right beside the generator. As you've said. Could you maybe send us a recording or a screenshot of your scene to support@incuvo.com, for our developers to look at? 
Also, we're about to release a brand new patch, that's including a visual upgrade to the game, so stay tuned! Hopefully we will be able to change your mind about the game, and you'll have a good experience with it :)))

reviews.review_title: Strong start by a great team of devs
reviews.review_description:
This is the first game I ever pre-ordered on Meta Quest 3 and I don't regret it.
I am about 5 hours in and it's been a blast so far for its asking price.

The entire Tracked experience was wild to say the least, it wears its inspirations on its sleeve like Far Cry and The Forest while incorporating the knowledge they gained from porting Green Hell to VR. And graphically it's a standalone powerhouse for which I would love to see the Rift version of to be fair.

The crafting mechanics are a highlight and each of the recipes are like a mini puzzle at the crafting bench.

You really feel like you're undergoing a montage moment like Arnold in his 90's movies prepping for a big showdown when you craft all that you need for your next encounter.

The survival mechanics are awesome and gradually build up to make you a real survivor, in the end making your late father proud in the story, kinda like how the Tomb Raider 2013 reboot turned Lara into a survivor and killer.

The only thing I would request improvement on is the combat, sometimes it feels overly harsh and I end up spending a lot of my ammo trying to align my shots. Perhaps I haven't found the laser attachment yet? 😅
But even with the bow and arrows I miss the aiming line that helps you align your shots for example. 

Eitherway I am enjoying my experience a lot and hope the devs continue to improve the gunplay and optimizations. Like I said during my Twitch Streams of the game I would love to play a roguelite/metroidvania type mode of the game after finishing the story where we can have continuous gameplay and infinite replayability.

PS: Can we please get a Change Difficulty option while you are in your save? I am 4-5 hours in and only noticed 2 hours in on the in-game watch my character never goes hungry or thirsty on Easy mode 😅. I don't know if I would be up to replaying my first few hours again to turn up the difficulty so I can drink and eat to see the meters go up.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, the hunger and thirst not going down was a bug, that we've fixed with the first patch we've released on Friday, it should be all good now! 

Thanks for the positive review with good suggestions, and we're glad you're enjoying your time in the wild.

reviews.review_description: I’ve spent several hours playing the game and it is one of the best vr games I’ve played this year (in my opinion). Every new region of the map has more loot and more enemies to fight, and the story is just as good with the gang of smugglers and your visions of your father and sister. And those who complain about graphics think that every game nowadays has to look like GTA 6, the style is similar to the ps2 and I love it. Spending hours completing side missions and the main story :) (sorry for the yap)

developer_response.body: We're super happy to see you enjoying the game, thanks! Stay safe out in the wild!

reviews.review_title: good gameplay, cruddy story, mid visuals
reviews.review_description: this game is basically your run-of-the-mill Saints & Sinners clone with extra survival gameplay and dynamic crafting, the core framework is from a unity asset pack, the visuals suck (i can see every individual polygon on a spruce grouse) and the story is... Crap. Absolute crap. Fighting is crud aswell, enemies just shoot at you and duck back into cover.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts. We hear the feedback, improving visual quality is already in progress, and it will come in Patch 1.3!

reviews.review_title: Far Cry en VR juste un petit soucis
reviews.review_description:
Ayant été dégoûté par l'interface (la boussole qui gâche toute l'immersion) je n'avais pas avancé dans le jeu, je m'y suis relancé et franchement j'adore, le seul problème c'est la boussole, c'est tellement dommage !!
Par pitié enlevez cet ATH !
Please remove the HUD when you sprint and all indicators.....

developer_response.body: Thanks for the suggestion, we'll keep it noted!

reviews.review_description: So I just finished where u go to the lumber place and steal the walkie talkie and Sam asked you to up with her the objective is the find a way around or through the lake or something and it says go in the cave and I went in and all the doors are locked from the other side I’ve looked everywhere and I can’t go to the objective this is before the meth lab and the mission is called meeting with Sam

developer_response.body:
If youre deeper in the Meth Lab -  you might need to go to Vince's office, grab the keycard, watch the cutscene, and then take out the enemies. This sequence of actions should open the locked doors.
If you just entered the caves - look up - you might be blocked by a hatch, look for an old padlock you can shoot to open it.
